title: Beyond a Star
description: This mod pack is a carefully re-design of the sky in minecraft, if you dont like the vanillia one we suggest you check this out
body:
+ What dose this mod pack add -
A complete revamp of the day and night cycle as well as the athestic look of the stars and moon

+ Why our mod? -
Monthly updates, discord community and other additions such as voted in features and collabs

+ Other things before you download -

+ No preformance mods were added you have to manually download those for the sake of not making this pack to large
